body_txt: This is what happens when you combine two of childhood's most reviled taboos... playing with sharp objects, and Playing with Fire . Great-great-great grandfather to the Laser Blade , this is a blade that is on fire (or possibly made of fire). Flaming swords are the traditional weapon and symbol of office of angels from on high —their infernal counterparts are likelier to wield a serrated flaming blade, or else a red-hot glowing pitchfork — because nothing says "gonna smite your ass" like being able to cut someone and burn them at the same time. Also a favorite trick of the Magic Knight , who may also vary it with different elements . Sub-Trope to Elemental Weapon . Contrast Hot Blade , for when swords are warm enough to glow, but not to actually burn. A type of Impossibly Cool Weapon , for when your Cool Sword really needs that special touch (but don't actually mistake Cool Sword for being this trope's inverse). See also Incendiary Exponent , Fire-Breathing Weapon , and Oddly Shaped Sword (if the sword is flame-shaped). Don't expect it to ever be touched upon just how much Nightmare Fuel and Body Horror this should inflict on anybody on the receiving end (fire or a blade is bad enough).
